results.title: Call Intelligence | Attio Help Center
excerpts:
Section Title: Call Intelligence
Content:
Automatically record, transcribe, and store meetings in Attio, and leverage AI-powered insight templates to generate summaries, highlight key details, and streamline follow ups for seamless team collaboration.
Section Title: Call Intelligence > What you will learn
Content:
**Effortless call recording and storage**
Learn how Attio’s call recorder automatically joins meetings in Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams, transcribes conversations, and stores recordings directly in your CRM for seamless access.
**AI powered insights and summaries**
Discover how to create and apply custom AI insight templates that generate summaries, highlight key details, and provide actionable next steps tailored to different call types.
**Managing and using call recordings**
Explore how to access, filter, and organize your call recordings within Attio, leverage live insights, and use playback modes like pinned mode and picture-in-picture for efficient review.

results.title: Granola Integration - Attio
excerpts:
Section Title: Granola
Content:
Your AI-powered meeting notes, added to Attio
[Installapp](https://help.granola.ai/article/attio)
Official app
 ... 
Section Title: Granola > How it works
Content:
Use Granola to take notes during your customer meetings.
**Add to Attio from a note**
After a meeting, click Share > Attio.
Granola will suggest which Attio record to share your note to: choose a Person, Company or Deal (or you can choose manually)
**Add to Attio from a folder**
Create a Granola folder
Go to Folder Settings > Integrations and choose which Attio records to add meeting notes to.
When a meeting ends, add the notes to your Folder. Granola will automatically send notes to the relevant Attio records.
Notes will appear automatically in Attio. No copy/pasting required.

[](https://notes.granola.ai/download)
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Capturing exact customer quotes
Content:
Granola [captures device audio directly](https://docs.granola.ai/help-center/taking-notes/transcription) without joining your Zoom, Teams, or Meet call as a visible participant. No bot appears in the participant list, and no recording announcement plays at the start of the session. For customer research, this matters because participants share more openly when they do not feel monitored.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Translate insights to product actions
Content:
Connect Granola to over 8,000 apps through [Zapier integration](https://youtube.com/watch?v=s9dL2eIUfPQ) and push verified transcript insights directly into product tickets, Notion pages, or project management tools. The Notion integration creates database rows from meeting notes, and the Slack integration auto-posts summaries to the relevant channel after the meeting ends. For teams using HubSpot, Attio, or Affinity, native CRM integrations keep customer context in sync without manual data entry.
 ... 
Section Title: Product teams using AI notetaker transcripts to revisit decisions > Frequently asked questions
Content:
**How long does setup take before my first customer interview?** Under 5 minutes: download the desktop app, connect your calendar, and Granola automatically syncs your upcoming meetings with no training required and no new UI to learn during the call.
 ...

results.title:
Attio just launched a native call recorder. Here's a quick walkthrough of what makes it useful today, and what features might make it even more useful in the near future. 

And below is my take on… | Joe Rhew | 32 comments
excerpts:
[Attio](https://uk.linkedin.com/company/attio?trk=public_post-text) just launched a native call recorder. Here's a quick walkthrough of what makes it useful today, and what features might make it even more useful in the near future. And below is my take on what this might mean for the broader call recorder market:
1. Most call recorders these days are built off of [recall.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Frecall%2Eai&urlhash=aDZn&trk=public_post-text) (Granola and Gong are two exceptions that I'm aware of)
2. Because of this, the basic features like video recording, transcription, etc. have been commoditized
3. The value (and therefore, the extractable margin) that call recorders building on top of this commodity provide is largely in their UX + custom summarization prompts + integration capabilities
4.
 ... 
And there are call recorders like Granola that have a vastly different approach to the UX, and are gaining market share because of it (only possible because they aren't constrained by [recall.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Frecall%2Eai&urlhash=aDZn&trk=public_post-text) providing the underlying recording tech). Or call recorders like Gong that have a huge market share in the enterprise segment. 7. All this to say, I have no idea how the market is going to shake out but we might see some of:
- Previous [recall.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Frecall%2Eai&urlhash=aDZn&trk=public_post-text) customers deciding to build from the ground up
- Legacy CRMs acquiring call recorders
- UX becoming the key differentiator
At any rate, I appreciate that Attio is re-imagining what is possible for CRMs in the AI era and leading the charge here.
 ... 
Section Title: **Transcript**
Content:
[Bradford Crist](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradford-crist-787a5519?trk=public_post_comment_actor-name) 9mo
How is the native call recorder different from pulling in meeting notes from [Fireflies.ai](http://Fireflies.ai?trk=public_post_comment-text) , for example?
[1 Reaction](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fposts%2Fjoerhew_attio-just-launched-a-native-call-recorder-activity-7313561795791634433-CM_B&trk=public_post_comment_reactions) 2 Reactions
[Matthieu Cartillier](https://fr.linkedin.com/in/matthieu-cartillier?trk=public_post_comment_actor-name) 12mo
I really like the UX of attio, but there is not enough content about attio and everything we can do with it, compare to more established crm, do you have any links to recommand

I Automated My Meeting Notes With Granola.ai — Here's How
Section Title: I Automated My Meeting Notes With Granola.ai — Here's How > Comments 1
Content:
5 Likes 29,066 Views Feb 19 2026 \ \ \ Granola AI is the notepad built for this new era of AI-powered workflows. In this video I walk through three hands-on demos showing how your meeting notes can become the starting point for real automations — no programming required. Demo 1: Chat with a folder of meeting notes to get caught up before your next call. Demo 2: Drag a note into a folder to trigger a Zapier automation that creates a quote in Attio CRM. Demo 3: Connect Granola to Claude Desktop and push meeting context into Gamma to build a presentation.
